flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Catawba College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (59.8% → 47.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Catawba College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (53.7% → 47.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Catawba College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Catawba College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (68.5% → 77.3%).
